## Summary

What changed and why?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Manual verification in VS Code extension host

## Documentation

- [ ] README/docs updated if needed
- [ ] Changelog updated if needed

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked related issue(s)
- [ ] Added/updated tests where relevant
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
